Max is a five-year-old male bobcat. He
likes to spend his day snuggling and
playing with his companion Mary Ann.
Feeding time is every big cat's favorite
time of day. When they hear the food cart,
they get really excited.
[Music}
Aspen is an 18-year-old female cougar.
She likes to spend her day lounging
around on the top of her den. She gets so
excited for breakfast time, she doesn't
know whether to meow, purr or hiss. Write
it down. What a good girl you are!
I know it's your foot, oh goodness'
[Music]
Joseph is a 17-year-old male lion. He
likes to lounge on his platform and keep
his neighbors in line. Joseph's got a
special treat for his birthday, but
please note, this is not a part of his
main diet.
Get that off the stick there, Bud.
Should just put his head in ice cream.
Yum, yum, ice cream is good. Oh,
oh yeah, I can't get it off of the stick.
I know, he's like, hurry up,
you're so slow, you're so slow with my
ice cream! Ice cream!
Good job, buddy, good job. So good. Is
that good?-EDITED-DAL-DQ.srt
